title: Russia will not display military equipment at Victory Day parade due to Ukraine threat
description: Russia ​will hold a scaled-back version of its Victory Day parade marking the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II, the Kremlin said on Wednesday. For the first time in nearly two decades, the annual parade on Moscow's Red Square will not feature a military hardware display. The Kremlin said it was due to Ukraine's "terrorist activity".

FRANCE 24's Carys Garland reports.

title: US forces board ship suspected of heading to Iran port

The M/V Blue Star III was released by US forces "after conducting a search and confirming the ship's voyage would not include an Iranian port call," Central Command, which is responsible for American forces in the Middle East, said in a post on X.

The findings set out how climate change is having increasingly severe consequences in ​Europe, at a time when some governments seek to weaken emissions-cutting policies ‌over economic concerns.

Jihadists and Tuareg separatists are still positioned in the vast Sahelian country's north, three days after launching a stunning wave of attacks, in what Moscow said remained a "difficult" situation.

title: PSG prepare for Chelsea clash with Monaco rematch
description:
PARIS: Paris Saint-Germain warm up for their Champions League last-16 showdown with Chelsea by once again taking on Monaco on Friday, as coach Luis Enrique looked forward to “the best part of the season” starting.
	PSG have not managed to rediscover the exhilarating form that led them to Champions League glory for the first time in their history last season, but they come into March still on course to retain their French and European titles.

title: Король Британии Карл III выступил перед членами американского Конгресса
description: Король Британии Карл III выступил перед членами американского Конгресса. Как обращает внимание The New York Times, иностранные лидеры произносили речи на совместных заседаниях Конгресса более 120 раз с 1874 года, когда король Гавайев Давид Калакауа, тогда еще суверенного государства, положил начало этой традиции. Однако монархов в этом списке не так уж много. Карл III стал 11-м по счету королем, сделавшим это. Его предшественником был король Иорд

title: US intel agencies examining how Iran would react if Trump declares victory in war
description:
In initial days of conflict, intelligence community concluded such a declaration would be viewed by Iran as a win; White House says talks ongoing, US won't be rushed into bad deal
The post US intel agencies examining how Iran would react if Trump declares victory in war appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: JNF halts most funding for at-risk youth in West Bank over settler violence links
description:

title: Senators Fight For More Boosts to U.S. Airpower After Increase to F-15EX Order
description: As the USAF confirms its intent to buy more F-15EX Eagle IIs, Senators Budd and Shaheen have launched three new bills designed to expand the U.S. fighter inventory and retain experienced pilots. title: Hanwha and Magnet Defense partner for US DoW’s MUSVs
description:
Hanwha Defense USA (HDUSA) and Magnet Defense have entered into a strategic partnership to produce medium uncrewed surface vessels (MUSVs).

title: Three’s company: Trio of US carriers operating in Middle East for first time in decades
description: Three U.S. aircraft carriers are operating in Central Command's area of responsibility for the first time since 2003.

title: US Navy destroyer intercepts Iranian-flagged vessel trying to skirt blockade
description: Zero vessels have broken through the U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz since it began Monday, U.S. Central Command stated.

title: US Navy to blockade Strait of Hormuz ‘effective immediately,’ Trump says
description: “Any Iranian who fires at us, or at peaceful vessels, will be BLOWN TO HELL!” the president wrote on Sunday.
